request.experiment_type: Workflow evaluation for rapid and low-latency decoding from fNIRS signals
research_goals: Find papers on rapid or early-stage decoding from fNIRS signals.
Find papers on real-time or low-latency fNIRS classification methods.
Find papers on single-trial fNIRS decoding and brain-computer interface use cases.
Identify methods, features, and evaluation settings suitable for fast fNIRS decoding pipelines.
constraints: Prioritize papers that explicitly evaluate decoding speed, latency, or early prediction windows.
Include both methodological papers and application papers in BCI or neuroergonomics contexts.
Prefer papers with enough experimental detail to inform gap analysis and experiment design.
exclusion_rules: Exclude studies without decoding or classification outcomes.
Exclude papers without enough abstract detail to judge task relevance.

notes: Initial real-run draft for the rapid fNIRS decoding topic.
